6:["$","$L18",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne import Mnemosyne\n\nmem = Mnemosyne()\n# Or with a named session:\nmem = Mnemosyne(session_id=\"agent-42\")\n","language":"python"}]
7:["$","h2",null,{"children":"2. Store Information"}]
8:["$","$L18",null,{"code":"# Simple memory\nmem.remember(\"Alice is a backend engineer who prefers Go over Python.\")\n\n# With metadata and importance\nmem.remember(\n  content=\"Project deadline moved to Friday.\",\n  source=\"slack\",\n  importance=0.8,\n  metadata={\"project\": \"alpha\"},\n)\n","language":"python"}]
9:["$","h2",null,{"children":"3. Recall Information"}]
a:["$","$L18",null,{"code":"# Semantic search\nresults = mem.recall(\"What programming language does Alice prefer?\")\n\n# Limit the number of results\nresults = mem.recall(\"deadline\", top_k=3)\n\n# Get recent context for a prompt\ncontext = mem.get_context(limit=5)\n","language":"python"}]
b:["$","h2",null,{"children":"4. Update and Delete"}]
c:["$","$L18",null,{"code":"# Update a memory's content or importance\nmem.update(\"mem_abc123\", content=\"Deadline moved to Monday.\")\n\n# Delete a single memory\nmem.forget(\"mem_abc123\")\n\n# Mark a memory as superseded by a newer one\nmem.invalidate(\"mem_old456\", replacement_id=\"mem_new789\")\n","language":"python"}]
d:["$","h2",null,{"children":"5. Inspect Memory State"}]
e:["$","$L18",null,{"code":"# Get statistics\nstats = mem.get_stats()\nprint(f\"Working: {stats['working_count']}\")\nprint(f\"Episodic: {stats['episodic_count']}\")\nprint(f\"Database size: {stats['db_size_mb']:.1f} MB\")\n","language":"python"}]
f:["$","h2",null,{"children":"6. Use the Scratchpad"}]
10:["$","$L18",null,{"code":"# Jot down transient notes\nnote_id = mem.scratchpad_write(\"Remember to check the API logs tomorrow.\")\n\n# Read scratchpad entries\nnotes = mem.scratchpad_read()\n\n# Clear when done\nmem.scratchpad_clear()\n","language":"python"}]
